examples: In a new move, ICES set a new recommended TAC of 390,000mt on the catch of Barents Sea Capelin for 2009 after a 5 year recommended Zero-TAC.
After rapidly warming, a sea once swimming with fatty forage fish like herring and capelin eventually became dominated by pollock, Atka mackerel and flatfish.
Especially if you have lots of cod and capelin to keep you going.
